Your goal is to refactor the existing HTML codebase to ensure it adheres to the latest HTML5 standards.

Identify areas where the code can be improved, such as:
- Updating deprecated tags and attributes
- Ensuring proper semantic markup
- Improving accessibility features
- Validating the HTML structure
- Enhancing performance with modern practices
- Ensuring consistency in all HTML files
